examples: A bureaucrat, who declined to be named said, "It's like Silicon Valley versus Wall Street."
After Mr Khodorkovsky's case, a judge taking instructions from a bureaucrat felt he was in the right.
J. K. Dadoo, the most senior bureaucrat in Delhi's environment department, blames them for the 2005 floods that killed hundreds in Mumbai.
And why should a bureaucrat take any risk at all when it comes to public health?
But no politician or bureaucrat seems prepared to raise doubts, if, indeed, any are harbored.
